description: A graphic styled as a news item. Small black text at the top left reads LOCAL NEWS, with a bold black serif headline below reading Florida tops the nation in ICE arrests this year, report says. The lower portion is a photograph of a white-and-blue marked police SUV with POLICE lettering parked outside a low glass-fronted office building with landscaped shrubs and trees.
notable_text: LOCAL NEWS; Florida tops the nation in ICE arrests this year, report says; POLICE
